perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman stands in a refrigerated aisle of a Costco warehouse, holding a large orange and white bag of 'Yuan Jin Chuang' crispy chicken breast nuggets. She gestures toward the product and turns it around to show the back packaging. (2) The scene transitions to a home kitchen setting where two women sit at a table. A plate of golden-brown fried chicken nuggets is in the center. They pick up pieces with forks, hold them close to the camera to show the texture, and eat with exaggerated expressions of enjoyment. (3) They continue to talk and point at the chicken pieces while gesturing with their hands, finally giving thumbs up to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female vocals begin immediately, speaking enthusiastically over upbeat, rhythmic background music with a medium tempo. Subtle ambient store noise is audible. (2) The music continues as two female voices engage in a conversation, describing the cooking process and flavor profiles. Sound effects of chewing and 'ping' noises for text highlights are heard. (3) The vocal density remains high as they conclude their review with encouraging tones, accompanied by a final musical flourish.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' and '超級黑馬!' (Super Dark Horse!) appear as a header. Subtitles translate the dialogue about price (369 yuan) and weight (1.5kg). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '酥炸原塊雞胸丁' (Crispy Fried Original Chicken Breast Pieces) and '好吃' (Delicious) appear in colorful bubbles. (3) Instructions: '180度加熱 10-12分鐘' (Heat at 180 degrees for 10-12 minutes) and '贏過了速食店' (Beat the fast food restaurants) appear with emotional emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro in store -> Product display -> Home cooking result -> Tasting and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women with long dark hair, one wearing a grey sweater and the other a teal turtleneck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco cold storage aisle with glass doors and various food items. Second scene is a home dining area with a table and blurred background items.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright fluorescent and natural indoor light

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Info -> Demo -> Evaluation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a commercial recommendation for a specific brand of frozen chicken nuggets sold at Costco. It aims to persuade viewers of the product's value by highlighting its size, price, and ease of preparation in an air fryer, concluding with a highly positive taste test.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the brand logo, focus on product features, and strong positive verbal recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety show style editing with pop-up text and emotional reactions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'KOL' (Key Opinion Leader) marketing tactics, focusing on 'Costco finds' which is a popular niche for lifestyle content.
